# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.

Prevent api gateway security.
# Category: api_gateway_security

# Kong configuration file

# Upstream services
upstreams:
  - name: "microservice-1"
    url: "http://localhost:8001"
  - name: "microservice-2"
    url: "http://localhost:8002"
  - name: "microservice-3"
    url: "http://localhost:8003"

# Routes
routes:
  - name: "api-route-1"
    paths: ["/api/v1/*"]
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    upstream_url: "http://microservice-1"
  - name: "api-route-2"
    paths: ["/api/v2/*"]
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    upstream_url: "http://microservice-2"
  - name: "api-route-3"
    paths: ["/api/v3/*"]
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    upstream_url: "http://microservice-3"

# Plugins
plugins:
  - name: "cors"
    config:
      origins: ["*"]
      methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
      headers: ["Content-Type", "Authorization"]
      expose_headers: ["X-Custom-Header"]
      max_age: 3600
  - name: "rate-limiting"
    config:
      minute: 500
      hour: 10000
      day: 20000
